@startuml
' UML diagram generated from the provided image

class Library {
  - books: ArrayList<Book>
  - persons: ArrayList<Person>
  - borrowings: ArrayList<Borrowing>
  - standardBorrowingPeriod: int
  + Library()
  + addBook(book: Book): void
  + addPerson(person: Person): void
  + addBorrowing(borrowing: Borrowing): void
  + getBooks(): ArrayList<Book>
  + getPersons(): ArrayList<Person>
  + getBorrowings(): ArrayList<Borrowing>
  + getBorrowing(borrowing: Book): ArrayList<Borrowing>
  + getPerson(person: Person): Person
  + getPersonByName(name: String): Person
  + getPersonByNameSurname(name: String, surname: String): Person
  + getPersonByNameSurname(name: String, surname: String): Person
  + setBorrowingPeriod(period: int): void
  + setBorrowingPeriod(borrowing: Borrowing): void
  + extendBorrowing(borrowing: Borrowing): void
  + returnBook(book: Book): void
  + borrowBook(borrowing: Borrowing, person: Person, book: Book): void
  + toString(): String
}

class Borrowing {
  - id: int
  - book: Book
  - person: Person
  - borrowed_since: DateTime
  - borrowed_until: DateTime
  + Borrowing(id: int, book: Book, person: Person, borrowed_since: DateTime, borrowed_until: DateTime)
  + get(id): int
  + getBook(): Book
  + getPerson(): Person
  + getBorrowedSince(): DateTime
  + getBorrowedUntil(): DateTime
  + getBorrowingPeriod(): int
  + setBorrowingPeriod(period: int): void
  + setBorrowingPeriod(borrowing: Borrowing): void
  + toString(): String
}

class DateTime {
  - day: int
  - month: int
  - year: int
  - hour: int
  - minutes: int
  - seconds: int
  + DateTime(day: int, month: int, year: int, hour: int, minutes: int, seconds: int)
  + getDay(): int
  + getMonth(): int
  + getYear(): int
  + getHour(): int
  + getMinutes(): int
  + getSeconds(): int
  + setDay(day: int): void
  + setMonth(month: int): void
  + setYear(year: int): void
  + setHour(hour: int): void
  + setMinutes(minutes: int): void
  + setSeconds(seconds: int): void
  + addDays(days: int): void
  + addMonths(months: int): void
  + addYears(years: int): void
  + addHours(hours: int): void
  + addMinutes(minutes: int): void
  + addSeconds(seconds: int): void
